task: Update README.md with clear agent install instructions for datalox-trajectory-mcp / datalox-mcp without mixing legacy product loops.
summary: Added an Agent Install subsection to README.md for installing datalox-trajectory-mcp from a target repo, with Codex default, Claude variant, existing source checkout path, and the adopted repo local MCP entrypoint.
observations: README Install now tells agents to clone datalox-trajectory-mcp, run setup-multi-agent.sh codex, adopt the target repo, and verify status.
README now documents node bin/datalox-mcp.js as the target repo local MCP command after adoption, while reserving datalox-mcp for PATH-installed or linked package use.
The edit preserves the B2B trajectory MCP product boundary and avoids adding legacy note/skill promotion as a product loop.
